title: triticum volgense
intro: Triticum volgense is an ancient type of wheat that is now considered extinct, but its seeds and properties are still studied and referenced. While it is no longer cultivated, research suggests that it may have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Triticum volgense are still largely speculative, but some studies suggest it may help to lower cholesterol and blood pressure. However, since the plant is no longer available, herbal preparations are not currently possible, and any claims about its medicinal properties should be treated with caution.
